'''鈭歴-l-y''' ('''kasalay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbelap|umbelap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbelap|umbelap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-y
|-
! Lemma
| kasalay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalay|thisalay]] || [[word:jisalay|jisalay]] || [[word:shisalay|shisalay]] || [[word:kisalay|kisalay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusalay|thuthusalay]] || [[word:jujusalay|jujusalay]] || [[word:shushusalay|shushusalay]] || [[word:kukusalay|kukusalay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusalay|thusalay]] || [[word:jusalay|jusalay]] || [[word:shusalay|shusalay]] || [[word:kusalay|kusalay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusalay|thusalay]] || [[word:jusalay|jusalay]] || [[word:shusalay|shusalay]] || [[word:kusalay|kusalay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesalay|thesalay]] || [[word:jesalay|jesalay]] || [[word:shesalay|shesalay]] || [[word:kesalay|kesalay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosalay|thothosalay]] || [[word:jojosalay|jojosalay]] || [[word:shoshosalay|shoshosalay]] || [[word:kokosalay|kokosalay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosalay|thosalay]] || [[word:josalay|josalay]] || [[word:shosalay|shosalay]] || [[word:kosalay|kosalay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosalay|thosalay]] || [[word:josalay|josalay]] || [[word:shosalay|shosalay]] || [[word:kosalay|kosalay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙salay|th忙salay]] || [[word:j忙salay|j忙salay]] || [[word:sh忙salay|sh忙salay]] || [[word:k忙salay|k忙salay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasalay|thathasalay]] || [[word:jajasalay|jajasalay]] || [[word:shashasalay|shashasalay]] || [[word:kakasalay|kakasalay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasalay|thasalay]] || [[word:jasalay|jasalay]] || [[word:shasalay|shasalay]] || [[word:kasalay|kasalay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasalay|thasalay]] || [[word:jasalay|jasalay]] || [[word:shasalay|shasalay]] || [[word:kasalay|kasalay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasalay|shasalay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasalay|goshasalay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasalay|gokishasalay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasalayn眉|shasalayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaynkn眉|goshasalaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalayn眉|gokishasalayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasalaysh毛|shasalaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasalaynksh毛|goshasalaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasalaysh毛|gokishasalaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalayro|shasalayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaynkro|goshasalaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalayro|gokishasalayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalaymu|shasalaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaynkmu|goshasalaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalaymu|gokishasalaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasalaysher|shasalaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasalaynksher|goshasalaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasalaysher|gokishasalaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasalayng|shasalayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasalaynkng|goshasalaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasalayng|gokishasalayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasalaya|shasalaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasalaynkya|goshasalaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasalaya|gokishasalaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasalayam|shasalayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasalaynkyam|goshasalaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasalayam|gokishasalayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalayn眉sh毛|shasalayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaynkn眉sh毛|goshasalaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalayn眉sh毛|gokishasalayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalayn眉ro|shasalayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaynkn眉ro|goshasalaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalayn眉ro|gokishasalayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalayn眉mu|shasalayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaynkn眉mu|goshasalaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalayn眉mu|gokishasalayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalaysh毛n眉|shasalaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaynksh毛n眉|goshasalaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalaysh毛n眉|gokishasalaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalaysh毛ro|shasalaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaynksh毛ro|goshasalaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalaysh毛ro|gokishasalaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalaysh毛mu|shasalaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaynksh毛mu|goshasalaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalaysh毛mu|gokishasalaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalayron眉|shasalayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaynkron眉|goshasalaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalayron眉|gokishasalayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalayrosh毛|shasalayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaynkrosh毛|goshasalaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalayrosh毛|gokishasalayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalayromu|shasalayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaynkromu|goshasalaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalayromu|gokishasalayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalaymun眉|shasalaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaynkmun眉|goshasalaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalaymun眉|gokishasalaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalaymush毛|shasalaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaynkmush毛|goshasalaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalaymush毛|gokishasalaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalaymuro|shasalaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaynkmuro|goshasalaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalaymuro|gokishasalaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
